name: Aemon Targaryen
disambiguator: son of Jaehaerys I and Alysanne; Prince of Dragonstone; father of Rhaenys

name: Baelon Targaryen
disambiguator: son of Jaehaerys I; "Baelon the Brave," the Spring Prince; brother of Aemon; father of Viserys and Daemon

name: Rhaenys Targaryen
disambiguator: daughter of Aemon; wife of Corlys Velaryon; mother of Laena and Laenor

name: Corlys Velaryon
disambiguator: the Sea Snake; Lord of the Tides; husband of Rhaenys

name: Daella Targaryen
disambiguator: Princess; mother of Aemma Arryn; died 82 AC

name: Laena Velaryon
disambiguator: daughter of Rhaenys and Corlys; the "boy in the belly" who proved a girl, born 92 AC

name: Septon Barth
disambiguator: Hand of the King 41 years; Old King's most trusted friend; author of Unnatural History

name: Septon Eustace
disambiguator: of the royal sept; firsthand chronicler; rose to the Most Devout

name: Visenya
disambiguator: sister of Aegon the Conqueror, two years his elder

name: Maegor Targaryen
disambiguator: Maegor the Cruel; usurping uncle of Jaehaerys I

name: Rhaena Targaryen
disambiguator: sister of Jaehaerys I; began the dragon-egg-in-cradle tradition

name: Gaemon Targaryen
disambiguator: Gaemon the Glorious; greatest Targaryen Lord of Dragonstone before the Conquest

name: Balerion
disambiguator: the Black Dread; ridden by Viserys; died 94 AC

name: Dark Sister
disambiguator: Valyrian sword given to Daemon by the Old King

name: Iron Throne
disambiguator: seat of the King of the Seven Kingdoms

name: Driftwood Throne
disambiguator: ancient Velaryon seat; legend calls it a gift from the Merling King

name: Sea Snake
disambiguator: Corlys's self-designed ship; also his epithet

name: Cod Queen
disambiguator: fishing boat Corlys first captained at sixteen

name: Summer Maid
disambiguator: Corlys's ship, sailed to Volantis and the Summer Isles

name: Ice Wolf
disambiguator: Corlys's ship, sailed the Shivering Sea

name: The Testimony of Mushroom
disambiguator: verbal account of the court fool set down by an unnamed scribe

name: Unnatural History
disambiguator: Septon Barth's book, read to the dying Old King

name: The Reign of King Viserys, First of His Name...
disambiguator: Septon Eustace's history

name: House Velaryon
disambiguator: Valyrian house of Driftmark; the seahorse sigil; oldest Targaryen allies

name: House Targaryen
disambiguator: royal house of the Seven Kingdoms

name: House Baratheon
disambiguator: house of Storm's End (Jocelyn, Boremund)

name: House Arryn
disambiguator: house of the Vale (Aemma, Jeyne)

name: House Royce
disambiguator: house of Runestone; runic bronze armor (Rhea)

name: House Lannister
disambiguator: Tymond, Lord of Casterly Rock

name: House Tyrell
disambiguator: Matthos, Lord of Highgarden

name: Harrenhal
disambiguator: largest castle in the realm; site of the Great Council

name: Harrenton
disambiguator: tent-city that briefly became the fourth city of the realm

name: Driftmark
disambiguator: low-lying isle in the Gullet; seat of House Velaryon

name: High Tide
disambiguator: new castle Corlys built on Driftmark, pale stone with silver roofs

name: Castle Driftmark
disambiguator: dark, damp original Velaryon seat

name: Hull
disambiguator: town of three fishing villages below Castle Driftmark

name: Spicetown
disambiguator: trading town near High Tide

name: Dragonstone
disambiguator: stony smoking isle; where royal ashes were interred

name: Tarth
disambiguator: where Aemon was slain; home of the Evenstar

name: King's Landing
disambiguator: royal capital; site of the 98 AC tourney

name: Tower of the Hand
disambiguator: where Baelon died

name: Dragonpit
disambiguator: where Jaehaerys I's remains were burned

name: Kingswood
disambiguator: where Baelon fell ill hunting

name: Runestone
disambiguator: ancient castle in the Vale; seat of House Royce

name: Storm's End
disambiguator: seat of Boremund Baratheon

name: Winterfell

name: Riverrun
disambiguator: seat of Grover Tully

name: Citadel
disambiguator: seat of the maesters at Oldtown; Vaegon an archmaester there

name: Oldtown
disambiguator: one of the three cities larger than Harrenton

name: Lannisport
disambiguator: one of the three larger cities

name: Volantis
disambiguator: where Saera lives; a triarch fathered one bastard claimant

disambiguator: Corlys first sailed there at age six

disambiguator: port Corlys visited; Mysaria a Lysene dancing girl

disambiguator: port Corlys visited
